description: 5! chain reaches 120, the \binom formula chain reaches 10, and the (a+b)⁴ expansion holds at independent values of a and b
\binom (no bar) vs \frac (bar) used correctly, ! placed after the number, snug implicit multiplication like 4a³b with no \cdot in the expansion
Factorial unrolled into its full \cdot chain; choose shown symbol → formula → value
Braces only where needed (a^3b not a^{3b}); markers kept; text reads well
